title: rubus coreanus var. kouytchensis
intro: Rubus coreanus var. kouytchensis, also known as Korean black raspberry, is a variety of the Rubus coreanus plant native to Korea. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of anthocyanins and other polyphenols. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Rubus coreanus var. kouytchensis is often prepared as a tea, juice, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Korean medicine to treat various ailments.
